programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An ambitious professor (Nicholas Surovy) at a New England prep school campaigns for the retiring headmaster's (Roy Dotrice) position, only to wind up as a murder victim after winning the post.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Ireland soon after an American tourist's corpse lands in a wishing well near Tom Dempsey's (Rod Taylor) fishing lodge.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds no mourners, but plenty of suspects after a young tennis pro's domineering father is killed.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After convincing the star stylist at Jessica's beauty salon to jump ship, a sneaky entrepreneur turns up dead in the hair dresser's chair.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An insurance investigation reunites detective Garrett (Wayne Rogers) with Jessica who is in Aspen visiting her recently widowed friend (Leigh Taylor-Young).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps an inexperienced sheriff investigate a murder in a small desert town where the government may have conducted dangerous chemical experiments.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A research trip to New Orleans plunges Jessica into the world of the occult, when a businessman dies, and a voodoo doll is evidence.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After losing two elderly patients, a young nurse (Megan Porter Follows) is found holding a syringe containing poison and charged with murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Sloan makes some shocking discoveries about a murdered friend after the man's severed arm is found in the belly of a deceased shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark becomes suspicious of a veteran police officer who claims he killed his partner accidentally, when the dead man's widow sues the police department.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve and Amanda race to find a stolen antigen for a biological weapon that has infected Mark and Jesse.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The main rival of a celebrated young figure skater becomes the chief suspect in an attack, and Mark is out to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: After a widow seeking control of her late spouse's business hires Laura and Remington, corporate saboteurs blow up Laura's home.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington discover a frightened amnesiac has five identities, including one targeted for murder; guest Delta Burke.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A phone call lures Steele into the night, where his accidental car collision with a pedestrian is made to look like a murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben and Michelle defend a TV producer (Teri Austin) accused of murdering an obnoxious talk-show host.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The adulterous wife of a businessman is murdered, and an associate finds himself framed for the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle and Conrad search for Ben, who may have been kidnapped by vengeful ex-convicts.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A hotheaded professional tennis player (Vincent Van Patten) is accused of murdering his primary rival.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Conrad swings into action to determine who is harassing District Attorney March.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: Aurora and Nick discover a body while on a pre-honeymoon getaway; as they get closer to finding out what really happened, danger knocks on their doorstep.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mystery 101
programme.desc: After a book festival guest is murdered, Amy and Travis clash over the arrest of an unlikely suspect; Amy must fight to prove Travis has put the wrong person behind bars.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's investigation into ghost stories lands her in the dungeon.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica escapes from the dungeon and works with Inspector Lanahan to uncover the killer of an American investor.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Rome to help rewrite the script for the filming of one of her books, but the filming takes a tragic turn when a stuntman dies.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Detective Charlie Garrett's (Wayne Rogers) high bid on a mediocre painting puzzles Jessica; then, its second-rate artist is found dead.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When Jessica arrives at an ice cream company to get a check for charity, the funds have melted away and the company's co-founder is iced.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After being subpoenaed to testify at the jury probe of a brokerage house, Jessica is charged with contempt for speaking to a witness who is killed.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: In Japan, Jessica gets involved in the murder of a motorcycle racer, the son of an international CEO (Pat Morita).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica works hard to get her friend's (Tony Plana) Latino band a recording contract, until a murder rocks her plans.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After a clever serial killer is murdered in jail, Mark and Steve realize an equally lethal copycat is on the loose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After a clever serial killer is murdered in jail, Mark and Steve realize an equally lethal copycat is on the loose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Steve enter the glamorous world of modeling to track down an unlikely killer after the murder of a private investigator.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark discovers a case of insurance fraud in the hospital when a hasty cremation follows the misidentification of a corpse.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington engage in competitive larceny when a journalist vanishes while researching an international art-theft ring.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: The history of a vintage automobile contains clues to the identity of a murderer and the whereabouts of jewels worth millions.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A parrot's death on the set prompts feuding TV-commercial co-stars to suspect each other of attempted murder; guest Bibi Besch.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben (Andy Griffith) defends a difficult lawyer (Richard Masur) who has been charged with murdering a mobster.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben treads on thin ice while continuing his defense of a fellow attorney (Richard Masur) framed for murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a politician (Peter Haskell) framed for murdering a cartoonist (Ray Buktenica) who knew about his affair.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A baker friend (John Hancock) of Ben's is framed for the poisoning death of a rival bakery owner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A legal secretary (Shirley Knight) is accused of murdering her boss, who was having an affair with her daughter.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A murder investigation gets reignited in a house that's considered haunted by the Lawrenceton locals, and where years earlier, Aurora and Sally discovered a body as teenagers.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.sub-title: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime; Delores gets her big break.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Seth Hazlitt's benefit concert to save the woods near Cabot Cove is endangered when the lead singer is permanently silenced.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: The Dark Side of the Door
programme.desc: Details in a manuscript convince a young editor (Tracy Middendorf) that the author (Richard Beymer) kidnapped her 11 years earlier, but when the author is found dead, the editor becomes the primary suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When the producer of a hit twenty-something series is murdered, Jessica does some directing of her own.
